name: Cnb Bank, INC.
description_short: CNB Bank, Inc. is an FDIC-insured community bank offering personal and business banking services with a focus on local relationships and digital convenience.
description_long: CNB Bank, Inc. is a traditional community bank that emphasizes local presence and neighborhood banking relationships. The bank maintains multiple physical branch locations and combines in-person service with digital accessibility, positioning itself as a locally-rooted financial institution that understands the communities it serves. The bank offers a comprehensive range of banking products including personal checking and savings accounts, personal loans, business banking services, and cash management solutions. They provide online banking platforms for both personal and business customers, a mobile app for iPhone and Android, ATM access through their CNB Now self-service banking network, and business payment solutions including invoicing and payment acceptance through their Autobooks integration. Business customers can access specialized cash management services alongside standard deposit products. CNB Bank distinguishes itself through its emphasis on local market knowledge and community involvement, contrasting with larger national banks. They highlight their routing number (052204359) and NMLS certification (#681652) prominently, and maintain a dedicated Solution Center Team for personalized customer support. The bank promotes features like digital invoicing for business owners, fraud mitigation solutions, and flexible self-service banking options available 24/7 through their online and mobile platforms. As a traditional community bank, CNB Bank is best suited for customers who value local relationships and community banking while still wanting modern digital conveniences. The website content demonstrates a functional, straightforward banking operation without indicating specialization in fintech innovation or serving underserved populations, positioning it as a standard regional banking option.
services: Online banking platform for personal accounts
Online banking platform for business accounts (BizNow)
Mobile banking app for iPhone and Android (personal)
Mobile banking app for iPhone and Android (business)
Invoicing and payment acceptance through Autobooks integration
Debit/ATM card services with fraud reporting
Branch location services and loan payments
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by U.S. Government guarantee
Multiple digital channels including online banking, mobile apps for personal and business, and ATM access
Integrated business payment solutions with Autobooks for invoicing and payment acceptance
24/7 self-service banking through CNB Now with more functionality than standard ATMs
Dedicated Solution Center Team available for personal customer support
Emphasis on local branch presence and community involvement
Business cash management services alongside standard banking products
cons: Limited information on specific product rates, fees, or minimum balance requirements on public website
No indication of specialty lending products or niche market focus compared to competitors
Enrollment process for online banking requires phone contact (888-258-1520) for some customers, suggesting less streamlined digital onboarding

contact.address: 101 S Washington St, Berkeley Springs, WV 25411

best_for: Local business owners seeking integrated payment and invoicing solutions with relationship banking
Community-focused consumers who prefer in-person banking relationships alongside digital access
Small business owners needing cash management and business banking services
diagnosis: CNB Bank is best for customers in communities where the bank operates who value local banking relationships combined with modern digital convenience. The primary caveat is that as a community bank with limited public information about rates and fees, customers should contact them directly to compare competitiveness on specific products and services against larger regional or national banks.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 101 S Washington St, Berkeley Springs, WV 25411
